title: Boat Rental in Goa on a Budget: A Complete Guide for 2026
html:
In Goa, renting a boat for a day need not break the bank: a shared sunset cruise from Panjim can cost as little as 1,500 INR per person, and a self-drive motorboat from the Mandovi river starts at around 6,000 INR for a half-day. BoatHire24 connects you with verified operators across the state, making it easy to plan an affordable day on the water.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Goa?

The price range for boat rentals in Goa is wide, starting at 1,500 INR for shared trips and going up to 70,000 INR for a crewed yacht. Shared sunset cruises cost between 1,500 and 3,000 INR per person. A small motorboat for a half-day (4 hours) hire costs around 6,000 to 12,000 INR. For a larger catamaran or crewed yacht, expect to pay from 35,000 to 70,000 INR for a full day. You can compare verified boat listings and find the best deals by browsing yacht charter in Goa on BoatHire24.

Where to set off in Goa

Most boat rentals depart from the state's main ports and beaches. The capital, Panjim, offers the greatest variety, with operators along the Mandovi river. For a quieter launch, head to the fishing village of Betul or the beach at Palolem in the south. The waters around the historic Fort Aguada and Sinquerim beach are popular for day trips. Grand Island (Ilha Grande), about 11 nautical miles from Panjim, is a favoured destination for snorkelling and lunch stops. Other departure points include Cavelossim and Benaulim in the south, each with its own local marina and anchorage.

Which boat to rent

Choose the right boat based on your group size and the experience you want. The table below outlines the main options available in Goa.

  1. Motorboat (self-drive): Ideal for small groups of 4, 6 people exploring rivers and inlets; from 6,000 INR for a half-day.
  2. Sailboat or catamaran: Perfect for a relaxed full-day trip with 8, 10 guests; from 25,000 INR for a day charter.
  3. Crewed motor yacht (Azimut or Fairline): Comfortable for up to 12 guests with a skipper and crew; from 40,000 INR for a full day.
  4. Shared sunset cruise: A budget‑friendly option for solo travellers or couples, often on larger deck boats; from 1,500 INR per person.
  5. Private luxury yacht (Sunseeker or Lagoon): Top‑end experience for up to 15 guests with full crew, catering and water toys; from 65,000 INR for a full day.

For a detailed look at one popular option, visit the Salty Sun Charters charter page to see an Azimut 42 motor yacht available in Goa.

Price bands for boat rental in Goa

  • Shared sunset tour (1.5, 2 hours): 1,500, 3,000 INR per person
  • Small motorboat, self-drive, half-day: 6,000, 12,000 INR
  • Catamaran or sailboat, full-day, crewed: 25,000, 40,000 INR
  • Crewed luxury motor yacht (Azimut, Fairline, Sunseeker), full-day: 40,000, 70,000 INR

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Goa?

An Indian boating licence is required to operate a self‑drive boat, but the operator will confirm exact requirements at the time of booking. International visitors without a licence can hire a skipper. The high season in Goa runs from November to March, when the north‑easterly monsoon winds produce calm seas and clear skies.

For the best conditions, book between mid‑January and mid‑February, when the sea is flattest and the anchorage at Grand Island offers the clearest water for snorkelling.

At a glance

  • Price range: 1,500, 70,000 INR per person or per boat
  • Peak months: November to March
  • Typical trip length: 2 hours (sunset cruise) to 8 hours (full‑day charter)
  • Maximum guests: 4, 6 (self-drive) up to 15 (crewed yacht)
  • Currency: Indian Rupee (INR)

Questions about boat rental in Goa

Can I rent a boat for just a few hours in Goa?

Many operators in Goa offer half‑day trips of four hours, departing in the morning or afternoon.

What is the best time of day for a boat trip in Goa?

Morning trips (9am, 1pm) offer calm seas and little wind, while sunset cruises (4pm, 6pm) are popular for their coastal views and cooler temperatures.

Is food included on a boat charter in Goa?

Most full‑day charters include a meal or snacks, but shared sunset cruises usually provide only drinks; check the listing for details.

Can I book a boat for a wedding or special event in Goa?

Yes, several operators in Goa cater for events on board, with custom itineraries for up to 20 guests.

BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Goa or list your own. To explore more options or to become a host, visit the BoatHire24 marketplace and discover thousands of boats across the globe.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Goa and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
